name: Tasha Services
registry_source: FL Sunbiz (not located under this exact name)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). SAFER search returned no records for 'Tasha Services'. Listed at 20533 Biscayne Blvd #1342, Aventura, FL 33180; phone (305) 636-3616; website artransportation.net. Shares address with ART Transportation (also in Aventura at same suite); FMCSA SAFER has no ART TRANSPORTATION entity in FL (only OR USDOT 1490655 and CA USDOT 2775638). Tasha Services may be a DBA or trade name. Disability/wheelchair-focused service. FL Sunbiz did not return a direct match; possibly registered under a different legal name or as a fictitious name.

name: Caring Harts Transportation
registry_source: BBB / D&B / NPI (NPI 1598948499); legal name 'Caring Hart's Transport, Inc.'
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate NEMT operator). SAFER searches for 'CARING HARTS TRANSPORTATION', 'CARING HARTS', and 'CARING HART' returned no records. Legal name is Caring Hart's Transport, Inc. Provides non-emergency wheelchair/stretcher transportation in Wyoming County NY. Address 4077 Main St, Strykersville NY 14145. Phone (716) 457-3051. Approx. annual revenue $1.78M, ~16 employees. Founded 2006 with assistance from Wyoming County Micro Loan program.

name: SP & R Transportation
registry_source: MA Secretary of the Commonwealth (per third-party profiles; SOS website returned 403 to automated fetch)
notes: No USDOT for the Wakefield MA entity (likely intrastate). SAFER searches for 'SP & R TRANSPORTATION' and 'SP R TRANSPORTATION' returned no records. NOTE: USDOT 501838 / MC 220578 belongs to a DIFFERENT entity 'S P & R TRANSPORTATION OF NH INC' at 210 Donahue Rd, Dracut MA (196 power units, 300 drivers, intrastate non-HM, active) — this is NOT the Wakefield operator. The Wakefield entity is a small school bus operation at 17 New Salem St, Wakefield MA 01880, phone (781) 224-0003, incorporated MA 2008, ~$130K revenue, ~2 employees, manager Allan Aronson.

name: Zweigart Bus Svc Inc
registry_source: IL Secretary of State (Business Entity Search at apps.ilsos.gov/businessentitysearch); third-party profiles
notes: No USDOT (intrastate-only school bus carrier). SAFER searches for 'ZWEIGART BUS SERVICE', 'ZWEIGART BUS', and 'ZWEIGART' returned no records. Legal name Zweigart Bus Service Inc, established 1963 and incorporated in Illinois. Two locations referenced: 601 6th St, Evansville IL 62242 (phone 618-853-2614) and 623 S Saint Louis St, Sparta IL 62286 (phone 618-443-2511). Serves Sparta CUSD 140 since 1963. ~$556K annual revenue, ~20 employees. School and charter bus operator.
